title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package exposing Ollama models as LLM, chat, and embedding components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (chat UI, model management, multi-user, RAG, plugins).

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (text-user interface) for browsing, pulling, and chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a free local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client for Ollama with Kotlin extensions; sync & async APIs, streaming, embeddings.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation example using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack component wrapper so Ollama models can be used as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async streaming, embeddings, and tool calls.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that brings local Ollama models into any server with slash commands.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that caches and serves Ollama models inside CI pipelines for reproducible LLM tests.

title: ollama-sdks
summary: Meta-repository tracking community SDKs for Go, Ruby, Rust, Swift, and more.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate providing strongly-typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM prompts inside your vault for summarization and brainstorming.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package downloaded 50k+/week; zero dependencies, full TypeScript support.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official Python package with 100k+ monthly downloads; supports 3.8+ and async/await.

title: r/ollama
summary: Active subreddit (20k+ members) for sharing models, tips, and integrations around Ollama.
